<!-- Source: HLD §3 (containers), §4.4 (component responsibilities), ADR-3/4/5. Packages reflect real HLD components only. -->

# Package Diagram — RAG Refinement System

```mermaid
graph TB
    subgraph api["api_gateway (FastAPI, ADR-5)"]
        ROUTES["routes: /v1/route, /v1/answer,<br/>/v1/documents, /health, /ready"]
        AUTH["auth: API key + OAuth2/JWT (ADR-7)"]
        ERR["errors: RFC-7807 problem+json"]
    end

    subgraph ingestion["ingestion (data-engineer)"]
        PARSE["parse_toc: PyMuPDF / Unstructured / Azure (ADR-4)"]
        CHUNK["chunker: section-aware"]
        EMBED["embedding_client: text-embedding-3-small / BGE-M3 (ADR-6)"]
    end

    subgraph orchestration["orchestration (LangGraph 1.0, ADR-3)"]
        ROUTER["router_node: Claude 3 Haiku (ADR-1)"]
        RETRIEVE["retrieve_nodes: targeted + fallback"]
        RERANK["rerank_node: Cohere Rerank-3 (ADR-8)"]
        GENERATE["generate_node: Claude / GPT-4o"]
    end

    subgraph persistence["persistence"]
        PG["postgres_store: documents, sections (ADR-10)"]
        QD["vector_store: Qdrant / ChromaDB (ADR-2)"]
        OBJ["object_store: raw uploads"]
        CACHE["toc_cache: in-process LRU"]
    end

    subgraph compliance["compliance (DPDP)"]
        ERASE["erasure_cascade (OAQ-2)"]
        ACCESS["data_access_export"]
        RESIDENCY["residency_router"]
    end

    OBS["observability: LangSmith traces"]

    api --> ingestion
    api --> orchestration
    api --> compliance
    ingestion --> persistence
    orchestration --> persistence
    orchestration --> OBS
    compliance --> persistence
```

> Packages map 1:1 to HLD §4.4 component responsibilities. No package is invented beyond the HLD container set.
